gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مختلف فيه - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (0/111)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مختلف فيه - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (0/111)
text: مَنْ أَظْهَرَ لِلنَّاسِ مَا يُحِبُّ اللَّهُ وَ بَارَزَ اللَّهَ بِمَا كَرِهَهُ لَقِيَ اللَّهَ وَ هُوَ مَاقِتٌ لَهُ .

en.hubeali: Ali Bin Ibrahim, from his father, from Ibn Mahboub, from Dawood,

(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> having said: ‘The one who displays to the people what Allah<sup>azwj</sup> Loves and opposes Allah<sup>azwj</sup> with what He<sup>azwj</sup> Dislikes (showoff), he will find Allah<sup>azwj</sup> at war with him’.
en.sarwar: 10. Ali ibn Ibrahim has narrated from his father from ibn Mahbub from Dawud from abu ‘Abd Allah (a.s.) who has said the following: “Whoever shows off to people an act that Allah loves and opposes Allah with what He dislikes (showoff), he will find Allah at war with him.”
